_metadata.for_match: Houston Dynamo FC vs El Paso Locomotive FC
_metadata.competition: 2026 Lamar Hunt U.S. Open Cup — Round of 32
_metadata.notes: Updated April 14 with Charles's Perplexity Computer scan. KEY CORRECTIONS: (1) Bogusz baby due JULY 2026, NOT arrived — previous scans misread Wiktoria's Instagram timeline. (2) Guilherme now 5G/4A including 100th career goal vs Colorado. (3) Artur confirmed OUT all season (knee injury, preseason). (4) McGlynn QUESTIONABLE (new lower body, first time on injury report). (5) El Paso head coach Wilmer Cabrera WON 2018 Open Cup with Houston — revenge game narrative. (6) Rubio Rubín (El Paso) had baby boy YESTERDAY (April 13). El Paso 4-0-1 all season, better form than Houston right now.

matchday_hook: After a rough Saturday in Colorado (we don't need to talk about it), the Dynamo have one week to flip the script — and what better way than Wednesday night Open Cup energy at Shell Energy? 🏆 El Paso Locomotive rolls in, a USL squad that just went 4-0-1 and they are absolutely NOT here to be tourists. But this is a new competition, a clean slate, and Houston is a TWO-TIME Open Cup champion. Oh, and the man coaching El Paso tonight? Wilmer Cabrera — who WON the 2018 Open Cup right here at Shell Energy as Houston's head coach. He's coming back for it. Guilherme just hit his 100th career goal (even in a 6-2 loss, the man stays iconic — 5G/4A), Bogusz and Wiktoria are expecting their baby girl this summer 🤍, and Sviatchenko is back from suspension with something to prove. Ben Olsen knows what it takes. Time to defend the legacy.
vibe_strip_items: 🚂 El Paso Locomotive FC — Open Cup Round of 32, Wednesday night vibes
😬 Colorado was rough (6-2). Open Cup is a new competition. Bounce back starts NOW.
🏆 Two-time Open Cup champs (2018, 2023) — and El Paso's coach WON it with Houston in 2018. REVENGE GAME.
👶 El Paso's Rubio Rubín had his baby boy YESTERDAY. Is the man playing on zero sleep tonight?
💯 Guilherme's 100TH CAREER GOAL — even in a 6-2 loss he found the net. 5G/4A this season.
💪 Sviatchenko BACK — suspension served, redemption arc is live
🎯 El Paso: 4-0-1 all competitions — the Loco are in BETTER FORM than Houston right now
🇸🇻 Amando Moreno (El Paso) — 34K Instagram, El Salvador international, USL Team of the Week
1️⃣.1️⃣M Héctor Herrera still the biggest IG in the building (even if Wednesday was rough for him)
🤍 Bogusz and Wiktoria expecting their baby girl this SUMMER — July watch is on

hot_posts.description: Baby boy Adriel born April 13 — El Paso Locomotive posted congratulations. Melody Olvera Rubín (@melodyolvera) is the mom. Former MLS player (Real Salt Lake) playing tonight on literally zero sleep.
hot_posts.caption_excerpt: Congratulations to Rubio Rubín and family on the birth of baby boy Adriel! 🎉
hot_posts.why_its_hot: His son was born YESTERDAY. The man is showing up tonight possibly running on pure adrenaline and new dad energy. Former MLS player, El Salvador international, their best scorer. The most compelling storyline walking onto that pitch tonight is wearing El Paso's away kit.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: El Paso's striker had his baby boy born YESTERDAY (April 13). Adriel Rubín is one day old and his dad has a game to play. Wife Melody (@melodyolvera) is home with a newborn while Rubio is at Shell Energy. New dad energy: does it make you superhuman or completely useless? Houston is about to find out.

hot_posts.description: El Paso's head coach managed the Houston Dynamo from 2017-2019 and won the 2018 US Open Cup with them — right here at Shell Energy Stadium. Tonight he's back with a lower-division team trying to eliminate his old club.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: The revenge game writes itself. Cabrera won the trophy with Houston and now he's coaching the team trying to take it from them. The soccer gods have a sense of drama.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: El Paso's coach is Wilmer Cabrera — the man who WON the US Open Cup WITH the Houston Dynamo in 2018. He managed them 2017-2019. He knows Shell Energy Stadium. He knows this team. He came back with a USL squad to take the cup his old club now defends. You literally cannot write this.

hot_posts.description: 100th career goal scored at Colorado (90+3') — a piledriver from outside the box, even in a 6-2 loss. Dynamo posted 'Parabéns, Guilherme!' Now 5 goals, 4 assists in 6 MLS matches. 3rd in MLS for goal contributions.
hot_posts.caption_excerpt: Parabéns, Guilherme! ⚽ Goal 100 of his career.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: The man scored his 100th career goal in a 6-2 loss and somehow STILL made it about him. 439K Instagram followers, Neymar in his DMs, and now a milestone goal. He's literally carrying this team's content output on his back.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: Guilherme scored his 100th career goal at Colorado (90+3'). In a 6-2 loss. On the road. The main character energy does not stop. 5 goals, 4 assists in 6 matches — 3rd in all of MLS for goal contributions. Neymar texted. The legacy grows.

hot_posts.description: Isybella competed on Beast Games Season 2 and has been posting about a fertility journey
hot_posts.why_its_hot: MrBeast connection + personal vulnerability content. She's also a former elite triple jumper. The toddler Bond calls the Dynamo kit 'Daddy footy.'
hot_posts.suggested_tea: The goalkeeper's wife was on BEAST GAMES. As in the MrBeast show. On Amazon. We need to talk about this.

hot_posts.description: Featured in a Dynamo coffee recommendations reel — the captain is doing Houston lifestyle content now. Also posted 'Step by step we climb' after the Seattle loss (Apr 3).
hot_posts.caption_excerpt: Step by step we climb, focused on ourselves
hot_posts.why_its_hot: The man who lived an entire telenovela vs Dallas (goal + own goal + red card) is now recommending pour-overs and posting motivational captions. He's back from suspension and channeling his inner barista. The duality of Erik Sviatchenko.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: Sviatchenko served his suspension, posted a 19-year anniversary tribute, and is now doing Houston coffee content. Romance on the timeline, chaos on the pitch, and now pour-over recommendations. He's BACK for Open Cup with something to prove.

hot_posts.description: CORRECTION: Baby girl is due JULY 2026 — not February/March as previously thought. Per Bogusz's post-Portland interview (March 15): 'We're going to have a daughter in July.' Wiktoria's Jan 21 bump post with '02.2026 💝' was misread as a birth announcement — she was showing the bump, not announcing arrival. Wiktoria still quiet on social (last own post Jan 21, tagged in Bogusz's Mar 15 Houston post).
hot_posts.why_its_hot: The ball-under-jersey celebration after the Portland win (March 15) was Bogusz announcing the pregnancy. 'We're going to have a daughter in July' — his words. Wiktoria (@wiktoria.wychowska, 24K followers, @no13.pilates) is in full pregnancy mode. July baby watch is on.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: Correction from last week: Bogusz's baby girl is coming in JULY, not already here. The ball-under-jersey celebration in March was the pregnancy announcement. Wiktoria, 24K Instagram followers and Pilates instructor, is expecting this summer. The reveal is going to be worth the wait.

hot_posts.description: Birthday tribute to husband Agustín Bouzat on his 32nd birthday.
hot_posts.caption_excerpt: Birthday tribute to Chiqui Bouzat — 32 years young
hot_posts.why_its_hot: Fiorella is a Physical Education teacher, mom to 2-year-old Salvador, and posted the sweetest tribute. Argentine couple goals in Houston.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: The Bouzat-Curutchet family is settling into Houston beautifully. Salvador turned 2 in January, Bouzat turned 32 on March 28. Family vibes are immaculate.

hot_posts.description: Daughter's 1st birthday celebration — '1 ano da nossa pequenina!' while sidelined with season-long knee injury.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: Artur is OUT all season with a knee injury sustained in preseason — the earlier 'mid-April return' timelines were optimistic. But the daddy content is pure. His daughter's first birthday post was pure joy while he's stuck on the sideline.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: The Brazilian midfielder won't make it tonight — confirmed OUT all season with a preseason knee injury. But he showed up for what matters: daughter's first birthday was celebrated with the best post on the squad's entire social feed.

hot_posts.description: 'Marzo 2026' monthly recap post. Also: conceded the penalty for Colorado's 6th goal (90+5'). The 1.1M followers are watching a man in a difficult moment.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: 1.1M followers — the squad's biggest social presence. The Colorado match was rough for HH specifically (penalty conceded in stoppage time). But he's doing lifestyle content and staying composed. The energy is: we move forward.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: 1.1M followers and still the most followed man on the squad. The Colorado game stung — penalty conceded in 90+5'. But Héctor Herrera's monthly lifestyle recaps don't stop for bad results. Resilience is the brand.

hot_posts.description: Houston lost 6-2 to Colorado Rapids on April 11. Now 2-4-0, 13th in the Western Conference. Open Cup is their best chance to win something this season.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: The stakes of tonight are higher than they look. A USL team in better form, a former Houston manager on the opposing bench, and a two-time champion club needing a result badly. The two-time Open Cup champs have something to prove.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: Four days after a 6-2 loss, the two-time Open Cup champions host a USL team whose coach WON this tournament right here with Houston in 2018. The math is simple: this is how you answer a bad week. Guilherme, Sviatchenko, and the rest have a very clear statement to make on Wednesday night.

hot_posts.description: 29th birthday celebrated by the team and on his personal feed.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: The #10 just turned 29 and is working to find his form. Wife Martina has been on a social media break since July 2024 — a rare pair of private people in a very public squad.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: Ponce turned 29 and the squad showed up. The DP is still finding his rhythm in Houston — but the birthday love from teammates says the dressing room believes in him.

injury_flags.detail: 1-match suspension SERVED vs Seattle Sounders (April 4). Captain returns for Open Cup.
injury_flags.impact: Redemption arc content angle — back and ready to lead the backline.

injury_flags.detail: 2-match ban (serious foul play vs Portland) fully served. Available for selection.
injury_flags.impact: Forward option returns to the squad.

injury_flags.detail: Knee injury sustained in preseason. Has been OUT all season. Transfermarkt lists 5+ missed matches. No timeline for return — 'mid-April' projections were optimistic and have passed.
injury_flags.impact: Key CDM is confirmed absent. Spine of the team continues to be missing.

injury_flags.detail: Lower body injury. Still OUT per April 10-11 MLS availability report. Mid-April return timeline has passed without return. Unlikely for April 15.
injury_flags.impact: Defensive depth compromised. Madison Tayler providing moral support from the stands.

injury_flags.detail: New lower body injury. Listed as questionable on Matchday 7 (April 10-11) availability report — first time on the injury report this season. Worth watching in the lineup.
injury_flags.impact: Midfield option uncertain. If out, depth in midfield is thin.

roster_changes.detail: Not on official roster as of April 3, 2026 verification.
WAIVED March 18, 2026. No longer with the club.
9 jersey number changes verified: Antônio Carlos (25→3), Franco Negri (3→21), Reese Miller (34→27), Bouzat (22→30), Arana (17→22), Markanich (7→17), Ibrahim (27→24), Vines (TBD→13), Resch (TBD→34).

opponent_scouting.competition: 2026 Lamar Hunt U.S. Open Cup — Round of 32
opponent_scouting.form_summary: 4-0-1 across all competitions (W4-D1-L0), 3rd in USL Western Conference. Beat New Mexico United 4-0 in Open Cup Round 1, beat Laredo Heat 2-0 in Round 2. They are in BETTER FORM than Houston right now.
opponent_scouting.head_coach_note: Wilmer Cabrera (managed Houston Dynamo 2017-2019, WON the 2018 US Open Cup with them at Shell Energy Stadium). REVENGE GAME narrative — this is the most compelling storyline of the match.
opponent_scouting.rotation_risk: LOW — This is El Paso's biggest game of the season. No Champions Cup commitments. Expect their full strength XI.
opponent_scouting.narrative: El Paso is coming to Houston with something to prove — AND their coach already knows how to win this tournament here. Wilmer Cabrera won the 2018 Open Cup with the Dynamo. He's coming back with a USL squad on a 4-match winning streak to take the trophy his old club defends. The soccer gods have a sense of drama.

players_to_watch.name: Rubio Rubín
fun_facts: Former MLS player with Real Salt Lake
Goals in 3 of first 4 USL matches including opening day brace
Wife Melody (@melodyolvera) is home with a 1-day-old baby right now
players_to_watch.one_liner: The new dad. His son was born yesterday. He's playing tonight anyway. New dad energy is either going to make him superhuman or completely useless — Houston is about to find out.

players_to_watch.name: Amando Moreno
fun_facts: 34K Instagram followers — more than most Houston Dynamo players
USL Championship Team of the Week (Week 5)
Hit 50+ career USL Championship goals milestone this season
Currently listed as single per public sources
players_to_watch.one_liner: The milestone man. 34K Instagram, El Salvador international, USL Team of the Week — this is El Paso's most dangerous attacker and he's got the followers to prove it.

players_to_watch.name: Eric Calvillo
fun_facts: Wife @__Lorennak tagged in his bio with ❤️
Scored in the 4-0 Open Cup win vs New Mexico
players_to_watch.one_liner: The Inner Circle connection. Calvillo has a wife (@__Lorennak) tagged in his bio and scored in the Open Cup win. He's the midfield engine and the one El Paso partner watchers should follow.

beat_writer_sources.author: Dustyn Richardson
beat_writer_sources.title: BCS — checked April 14, no Open Cup preview published yet
beat_writer_sources.key_takeaway: No El Paso-specific preview as of April 14 evening. Open Cup gets less beat writer coverage than MLS. Colorado recap (April 13) confirmed no new injuries beyond Artur/Halter.

beat_writer_sources.title: Mateusz Bogusz — Dynamo take baby steps over Timbers
beat_writer_sources.key_takeaway: BOGUSZ QUOTE: 'We're going to have a daughter in July, so that was good to score, so I can do this celebration.' — March 15, 2026. Baby due JULY, not February/March.

beat_writer_sources.title: Player Availability Report — Matchday 7
beat_writer_sources.key_takeaway: Houston: Artur (knee) OUT, Halter (lower body) OUT, McGlynn QUESTIONABLE (new lower body). Markanich and Sviatchenko AVAILABLE.

beat_writer_sources.outlet: El Paso Locomotive FC (club X account)
beat_writer_sources.title: Rubio Rubín baby announcement
beat_writer_sources.key_takeaway: El Paso congratulated Rubio Rubín on the birth of baby boy Adriel on April 13, 2026.
